通过 BPTT 迭代图的视角对 MLIP 进行微调#

On The Finetuning of MLIPs Through the Lens of Iterated Maps With BPTT
📚 arXiv👤 Evan Dramko, Yizhi Zhu, Aleksandar Krivokapic, Geoffroy Hautier, Thomas Reps, Christopher Jermaine, Anastasios Kyrillidis📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出一种基于BPTT的MLIP微调方法，通过构建端到端可微结构松弛循环，直接优化最终预测结构而非中间力，使预训练模型误差平均降低32%，且对超参数变化具有强鲁棒性，为高效准确的材料结构预测提供了
arXiv:2512.01067v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确的结构松弛对于先进材料设计至关重要。基于物理学推导的第一原理计算构建的传统方法在计算上是昂贵的，这激发了机器学习原子间势（MLIP）的创建，其努力忠实地再现第一原理计算力。我们提出了一种用于预训练 MLIP 的微调方法，在该方法中我们创建了一个完全可微的端到端模拟循环，可以直接优化预测的最终结构。在整个松弛过程中展开轨迹并跟踪梯度。我们证明，这种方法能够持续提高所有评估的…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2512.01067v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确的结构松弛对于先进材料设计至关重要。基于物理学推导的第一原理计算构建的传统方法在计算上是昂贵的，这激发了机器学习原子间势（MLIP）的创建，其努力忠实地再现第一原理计算力。我们提出了一种用于预训练 MLIP 的微调方法，在该方法中我们创建了一个完全可微的端到端模拟循环，可以直接优化预测的最终结构。在整个松弛过程中展开轨迹并跟踪梯度。我们证明，这种方法能够持续提高所有评估的预训练模型的性能；预测误差平均减少约 32%。有趣的是，我们表明该过程对于松弛设置的实质性变化是稳健的，在不同的超参数和程序修改中实现了可以忽略不计的不同结果。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.01067v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Accurate structural relaxation is critical for advanced materials design. Traditional approaches built on physics-derived first-principles calculations are computationally expensive, motivating the creation of machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs), which strive to faithfully reproduce first-principles computed forces. We propose a fine-tuning method to be used on a pretrained MLIP in which we create a fully-differentiable end-to-end simulation loop that optimizes the predicted final structures directly. Trajectories are unrolled and gradients are tracked through the entire relaxation. We show that this method consistently improves performance across all evaluated pretrained models; resulting in an average of roughly 32% reduction in prediction error. Interestingly, we show the process is robust to substantial variation in the relaxation setup, achieving negligibly different results across varied hyperparameter and procedural modifications.

75

数据驱动的主动学习方法加速材料发现#

Data-driven active learning approaches for accelerating materials discovery
📚 arXiv👤 Jiaxin Chen, Tianjiao Wan, Hui Geng, Liang Xiong, Guohong Wang, Yihan Zhao, Longxiang Deng, Zijian Gao, Susu Fang, Zheng Luo, Huaimin Wang, Shanshan Wang, Kele Xu📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该综述系统梳理了主动学习在材料科学中的技术演进，从贝叶斯优化到深度学习策略，核心创新在于将数据驱动采样与材料研究全流程（计算模拟、结构设计、工艺优化、自动驾驶实验室）深度融合，显著提升数据稀缺场景下的
arXiv:2601.06971v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：材料发现是现代技术进步的基石，但它仍然受到传统试错范式和人类直觉固有偏差的限制。人工智能 (AI) 通过有效地建模结构-性能关系，已成为材料科学领域的变革性工具。尽管为增强模型表达能力付出了巨大努力，但鉴于实验和计算资源的可用性有限，数据效率仍然是同样严峻的挑战。主动学习（AL）作为一种数据驱动的机器学习范式，在发现新颖材料和实现广阔材料空间的有效导航方面展现出了巨大的前景。…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.06971v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：材料发现是现代技术进步的基石，但它仍然受到传统试错范式和人类直觉固有偏差的限制。人工智能 (AI) 通过有效地建模结构-性能关系，已成为材料科学领域的变革性工具。尽管为增强模型表达能力付出了巨大努力，但鉴于实验和计算资源的可用性有限，数据效率仍然是同样严峻的挑战。主动学习（AL）作为一种数据驱动的机器学习范式，在发现新颖材料和实现广阔材料空间的有效导航方面展现出了巨大的前景。在这篇综述中，我们跟踪了 AL 中采样策略设计技术的演变，从贝叶斯优化到基于深度学习的高级策略。然后，我们重点介绍 AL 如何提高各种数据机制的数据效率，从有限数据的特定任务设置到通用数据集和大规模模型的开发。我们进一步系统地概述了整个材料研究流程中的 AL 应用，包括计算模拟、成分和结构设计、工艺优化和自动驾驶实验室系统。最后，我们指出了 AL 在材料发现方面的主要挑战和未来前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.06971v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Materials discovery is a cornerstone of modern technological advancement, yet it remains constrained by traditional trial-and-error paradigms and the inherent bias of human intuition. Artificial intelligence (AI) has emerged as a transformative tool in materials science by effectively modeling structure-property relationships. Despite substantial efforts to enhance model expressiveness, data efficiency remains an equally critical challenge, given the limited availability of experimental and computational resources. Active learning (AL), as a data-driven machine learning paradigm, has shown great promise for discovering novel materials and enabling the efficient navigation of vast materials spaces. In this review, we follow the evolution of sampling strategy design techniques in AL, from Bayesian optimization to advanced deep learning-based strategies. We then highlight how AL enhances data efficiency across various data regimes, ranging from task-specific settings with limited data to the development of general-purpose datasets and large-scale models. We further provide a systematic overview of AL applications throughout the materials research pipeline, including computational simulation, composition and structural design, process optimization, and self-driving laboratory systems. Finally, we pinpoint key challenges and future perspectives of AL in materials discovery.

76

核路线：超参数化二次网络中 ERM 的急剧渐近#

The Nuclear Route: Sharp Asymptotics of ERM in Overparameterized Quadratic Networks
📚 arXiv👤 Vittorio Erba, Emanuele Troiani, Lenka Zdeborová, Florent Krzakala📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将二次激活过参数化神经网络的ℓ₂正则化ERM问题等价转化为核范数惩罚的凸矩阵感知问题，首次给出训练/测试误差的尖锐渐近表达式，揭示了网络泛化能力本质上由学习特征图的低秩结构控制，为理解二次网络的
arXiv:2505.17958v3 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：我们研究了在合成数据上训练的二次激活的过参数化两层神经网络中经验风险最小化 (ERM) 的高维渐近性。通过将 ell₂ 正则化学习问题映射到具有核范数惩罚的凸矩阵感知任务，我们得出了训练和测试误差的尖锐渐近性。这表明此类网络中的容量控制来自学习特征图中的低阶结构。我们的结果描述了损失的全局最小值并产生精确的泛化阈值，显示了目标函数的宽度如何控制可学习性。…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2505.17958v3 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：我们研究了在合成数据上训练的二次激活的过参数化两层神经网络中经验风险最小化 (ERM) 的高维渐近性。通过将 ell₂ 正则化学习问题映射到具有核范数惩罚的凸矩阵感知任务，我们得出了训练和测试误差的尖锐渐近性。这表明此类网络中的容量控制来自学习特征图中的低阶结构。我们的结果描述了损失的全局最小值并产生精确的泛化阈值，显示了目标函数的宽度如何控制可学习性。该分析桥接并扩展了自旋玻璃方法、矩阵分解和凸优化的思想，并强调了二次神经网络中低秩矩阵感知和学习之间的深层联系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.17958v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We study the high-dimensional asymptotics of empirical risk minimization (ERM) in over-parametrized two-layer neural networks with quadratic activations trained on synthetic data. We derive sharp asymptotics for both training and test errors by mapping the ell₂₋ᵣₑgularized learning problem to a convex matrix sensing task with nuclear norm penalization. This reveals that capacity control in such networks emerges from a low-rank structure in the learned feature maps. Our results characterize the global minima of the loss and yield precise generalization thresholds, showing how the width of the target function governs learnability. This analysis bridges and extends ideas from spin-glass methods, matrix factorization, and convex optimization and emphasizes the deep link between low-rank matrix sensing and learning in quadratic neural networks.

77

注意力索引模型的贝叶斯优化学习#

Bayes optimal learning of attention-indexed models
📚 arXiv👤 Fabrizio Boncoraglio, Emanuele Troiani, Vittorio Erba, Lenka Zdeborová📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出注意力索引模型（AIM），首次以可解析方式刻画全宽度键查询矩阵的深度注意力层学习，导出贝叶斯最优泛化误差的闭式解及相变规律，并证明梯度下降可达最优，为理解Transformer核心机制提供了
arXiv:2506.01582v3 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：我们介绍了注意力索引模型（AIM），这是一种用于分析深度注意力层学习的理论框架。受多索引模型的启发，AIM 捕获了令牌级输出如何从高维嵌入的分层双线性交互中出现。与之前易于处理的注意力模型不同，AIM 允许全宽键和查询矩阵，与实际的转换器更加紧密地结合。使用统计力学和随机矩阵理论的工具，我们得出贝叶斯最优泛化误差的封闭式预测，并识别作为样本复杂性、模型宽…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2506.01582v3 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：我们介绍了注意力索引模型（AIM），这是一种用于分析深度注意力层学习的理论框架。受多索引模型的启发，AIM 捕获了令牌级输出如何从高维嵌入的分层双线性交互中出现。与之前易于处理的注意力模型不同，AIM 允许全宽键和查询矩阵，与实际的转换器更加紧密地结合。使用统计力学和随机矩阵理论的工具，我们得出贝叶斯最优泛化误差的封闭式预测，并识别作为样本复杂性、模型宽度和序列长度函数的尖锐相变。我们提出了一种匹配的近似消息传递算法，并证明梯度下降可以达到最佳性能。 AIM 提供了一个可解决的平台，用于理解自注意力层的学习，自注意力层是现代架构的关键组成部分。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.01582v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce the attention-indexed model (AIM), a theoretical framework for analyzing learning in deep attention layers. Inspired by multi-index models, AIM captures how token-level outputs emerge from layered bilinear interactions over high-dimensional embeddings. Unlike prior tractable attention models, AIM allows full-width key and query matrices, aligning more closely with practical transformers. Using tools from statistical mechanics and random matrix theory, we derive closed-form predictions for Bayes-optimal generalization error and identify sharp phase transitions as a function of sample complexity, model width, and sequence length. We propose a matching approximate message passing algorithm and show that gradient descent can reach optimal performance. AIM offers a solvable playground for understanding learning in self-attention layers, that are key components of modern architectures.

78

推进通用深度学习以实现材料的电子结构哈密顿量预测#

Advancing Universal Deep Learning for Electronic-Structure Hamiltonian Prediction of Materials
📚 arXiv👤 Shi Yin, Zujian Dai, Xinyang Pan, Lixin He📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作提出NextHAM方法，以DFT初始电荷密度构建的"第零步哈密顿量"作为输入描述符和初始估计，将学习目标转化为校正项，大幅降低学习难度；结合严格E(3)等变的神经Transformer架构与实空
arXiv:2509.19877v3 发布类型：replace-cross 摘要：用于电子结构哈密顿量预测的深度学习方法比传统的 DFT 方法具有显着的计算效率优势，但原子类型、结构模式的多样性以及哈密顿量的高维复杂性对泛化性能提出了巨大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们在方法论和数据集方面做出了贡献，以推进哈密顿预测的通用深度学习范式。在方法方面，我们提出了 NextHAM，一种神经 E(3) 对称性和表达校正方法，用于高效且可推广的材料电…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2509.19877v3 发布类型：replace-cross 摘要：用于电子结构哈密顿量预测的深度学习方法比传统的 DFT 方法具有显着的计算效率优势，但原子类型、结构模式的多样性以及哈密顿量的高维复杂性对泛化性能提出了巨大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们在方法论和数据集方面做出了贡献，以推进哈密顿预测的通用深度学习范式。在方法方面，我们提出了 NextHAM，一种神经 E(3) 对称性和表达校正方法，用于高效且可推广的材料电子结构哈密顿量预测。首先，我们引入了第零步哈密顿量，它可以通过DFT的初始电荷密度有效地构造，作为输入层神经回归模型的信息描述符和输出层目标哈密顿量的初始估计，使得回归模型直接预测目标地面事实的校正项，从而显着简化学习的输入输出映射。其次，我们提出了一种具有严格 E(3) 对称性和用于哈密顿预测的高非线性表达能力的神经 Transformer 架构。第三，我们提出了一种新的训练目标，以确保哈密顿量在实空间和倒易空间中的准确性表现，防止误差放大和由于重叠矩阵的条件数大而引起的“鬼态”的出现。在数据集方面，我们策划了一个高质量、广泛覆盖的大型基准，即 Materials-HAM-SOC，包含 17,000 个材料结构，涵盖元素周期表六行的 68 个元素，并明确纳入 SOC 效应。 Materials-HAM-SOC 上的实验结果表明，NextHAM 在预测哈密顿量和能带结构方面具有出色的准确性和效率。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.19877v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Deep learning methods for electronic-structure Hamiltonian prediction has offered significant computational efficiency advantages over traditional DFT methods, yet the diversity of atomic types, structural patterns, and the high-dimensional complexity of Hamiltonians pose substantial challenges to the generalization performance. In this work, we contribute on both the methodology and dataset sides to advance universal deep learning paradigm for Hamiltonian prediction. On the method side, we propose NextHAM, a neural E(3)-symmetry and expressive correction method for efficient and generalizable materials electronic-structure Hamiltonian prediction. First, we introduce the zeroth-step Hamiltonians, which can be efficiently constructed by the initial charge density of DFT, as informative descriptors of neural regression model in the input level and initial estimates of the target Hamiltonian in the output level, so that the regression model directly predicts the correction terms to the target ground truths, thereby significantly simplifying the input-output mapping for learning. Second, we present a neural Transformer architecture with strict E(3)-Symmetry and high non-linear expressiveness for Hamiltonian prediction. Third, we propose a novel training objective to ensure the accuracy performance of Hamiltonians in both real space and reciprocal space, preventing error amplification and the occurrence of "ghost states" caused by the large condition number of the overlap matrix. On the dataset side, we curate a high-quality broad-coverage large benchmark, namely Materials-HAM-SOC, comprising 17,000 material structures spanning 68 elements from six rows of the periodic table and explicitly incorporating SOC effects. Experimental results on Materials-HAM-SOC demonstrate that NextHAM achieves excellent accuracy and efficiency in predicting Hamiltonians and band structures.

79

压缩复杂性：动态网络中结构、分析和数据驱动的降维的关键综合#

Compressing Complexity: A Critical Synthesis of Structural, Analytical, and Data-Driven Dimensionality Reduction in Dynamical Networks
📚 arXiv👤 Zebiao Li, XueYing Wu, Chengyi Tu📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该综述首次系统整合结构粗粒化、分析约化与数据驱动降维三大谱系，揭示"没有免费午餐"定理在降维策略中的支配作用，并指出方程驱动与黑盒推理的认识论分野，为高维动态网络的跨尺度建模与科学机器学习融合提供理论
arXiv:2602.00039v1 公告类型：新 摘要：当代科学景观的特点是“维度诅咒”，我们收集高维网络数据的能力经常超出我们计算模拟或直观理解潜在动态的能力。这篇综述对通过从复杂系统中提取低维“宏观理论”来解决这一悖论而开发的方法进行了全面的综合。我们将这些方法分为三个不同的方法谱系：结构粗粒度，利用谱和拓扑重正化来物理收缩网络图；基于分析的归约，采用严格的 ansatzes（例如 Watanabe-Strogatz 和 Ott…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.00039v1 公告类型：新 摘要：当代科学景观的特点是“维度诅咒”，我们收集高维网络数据的能力经常超出我们计算模拟或直观理解潜在动态的能力。这篇综述对通过从复杂系统中提取低维“宏观理论”来解决这一悖论而开发的方法进行了全面的综合。我们将这些方法分为三个不同的方法谱系：结构粗粒度，利用谱和拓扑重正化来物理收缩网络图；基于分析的归约，采用严格的 ansatzes（例如 Watanabe-Strogatz 和 Ott-Antonsen）和矩闭包来导出简化的微分方程；数据驱动的归约，它利用流形学习和算子理论框架（例如库普曼分析）从观察轨迹推断潜在动态。我们假设缩减策略的选择受基本的“没有免费午餐”定理的支配，在计算易处理性和物理保真度之间建立了帕累托边界。此外，我们还发现，保留因果机制的基于方程的推导与优先考虑预测的黑盒推理之间存在着日益增长的认识论分歧。最后，我们讨论了新兴前沿，特别是单纯复形的高阶拉普拉斯重整化的必要性，以及混合“科学机器学习”架构（例如神经常微分方程）的开发，该架构将分析先验与深度学习融合起来以解决封闭问题。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.00039v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The contemporary scientific landscape is characterized by a "curse of dimensionality," where our capacity to collect high-dimensional network data frequently outstrips our ability to computationally simulate or intuitively comprehend the underlying dynamics. This review provides a comprehensive synthesis of the methodologies developed to resolve this paradox by extracting low-dimensional "macroscopic theories" from complex systems. We classify these approaches into three distinct methodological lineages: Structural Coarse-Graining, which utilizes spectral and topological renormalization to physically contract the network graph; Analytical-Based Reduction, which employs rigorous ansatzes (such as Watanabe-Strogatz and Ott-Antonsen) and moment closures to derive reduced differential equations ; and Data-Driven Reduction, which leverages manifold learning and operator-theoretic frameworks (e.g., Koopman analysis) to infer latent dynamics from observational trajectories. We posit that the selection of a reduction strategy is governed by a fundamental "No Free Lunch" theorem, establishing a Pareto frontier between computational tractability and physical fidelity. Furthermore, we identify a growing epistemological schism between equation-based derivations that preserve causal mechanisms and black-box inference that prioritizes prediction. We conclude by discussing emerging frontiers, specifically the necessity of Higher-Order Laplacian Renormalization for simplicial complexes and the development of hybrid "Scientific Machine Learning" architectures-such as Neural ODEs-that fuse analytical priors with deep learning to solve the closure problem.

80

HybridOM：基于物理和数据驱动的混合全球海洋建模，具有高效的空间缩小尺度#

HybridOM: Hybrid Physics-Based and Data-Driven Global Ocean Modeling with Efficient Spatial Downscaling
📚 arXiv👤 Ruiqi Shu, Xiaohui Zhong, Qiusheng Huang, Ruijian Gou, Tianrun Gao, Hao Li, Xiaomeng Huang📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：HybridOM 提出"数值骨架+神经网络血肉"的混合架构，以轻量可微求解器保证物理一致性，神经网络修正亚网格过程，并引入基于磁通选通的物理信息区域缩小机制实现高效高分辨率模拟。该工作为构建兼顾计算效
arXiv:2602.00598v1 公告类型：新 摘要：全球海洋建模对于气候科学至关重要，但很难在计算效率与准确性之间取得平衡。传统的数值求解器很准确，但计算成本昂贵，而纯深度学习方法虽然速度快，但往往缺乏物理一致性和长期稳定性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 HybridOM，这是一个框架，集成了一个轻量级、可微分的数值求解器作为骨架来执行物理定律，并以神经网络作为肉体来纠正亚网格尺度的动力学。为了实现高效的高分辨率建模，我们进一步…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.00598v1 公告类型：新 摘要：全球海洋建模对于气候科学至关重要，但很难在计算效率与准确性之间取得平衡。传统的数值求解器很准确，但计算成本昂贵，而纯深度学习方法虽然速度快，但往往缺乏物理一致性和长期稳定性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 HybridOM，这是一个框架，集成了一个轻量级、可微分的数值求解器作为骨架来执行物理定律，并以神经网络作为肉体来纠正亚网格尺度的动力学。为了实现高效的高分辨率建模，我们进一步引入了基于磁通选通的物理信息区域缩小机制。该设计实现了基于人工智能的方法的推理效率，同时保留了物理模型的准确性和鲁棒性。 GLORYS12V1 和 OceanBench 数据集上的大量实验验证了 HybridOM 在两种不同情况下的性能：长期次季节到季节模拟和与 FuXi-2.0 天气模型相结合的短期业务预报。结果表明，HybridOM 在严格保持物理一致性的同时实现了最先进的精度，为下一代海洋数字孪生提供了强大的解决方案。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/ChiyodaMomo01/HybridOM 获取。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.00598v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Global ocean modeling is vital for climate science but struggles to balance computational efficiency with accuracy. Traditional numerical solvers are accurate but computationally expensive, while pure deep learning approaches, though fast, often lack physical consistency and long-term stability. To address this, we introduce HybridOM, a framework integrating a lightweight, differentiable numerical solver as a skeleton to enforce physical laws, with a neural network as the flesh to correct subgrid-scale dynamics. To enable efficient high-resolution modeling, we further introduce a physics-informed regional downscaling mechanism based on flux gating. This design achieves the inference efficiency of AI-based methods while preserving the accuracy and robustness of physical models. Extensive experiments on the GLORYS12V1 and OceanBench dataset validate HybridOM's performance in two distinct regimes: long-term subseasonal-to-seasonal simulation and short-term operational forecasting coupled with the FuXi-2.0 weather model. Results demonstrate that HybridOM achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while strictly maintaining physical consistency, offering a robust solution for next-generation ocean digital twins. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ChiyodaMomo01/HybridOM.

81

用于智能路由的光子尖峰强化学习#

Photonic spiking reinforcement learning for intelligent routing
📚 arXiv👤 Shuiying Xiang (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Yonghang Chen (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Ling Zheng (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China, School of Communication and Information Engineering, Xi'an University of Posts and Telecommunications, Xi'an, China), Zhicong Tu (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Xintao Zeng (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Mengting Yu (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Shuai Wang (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Yahui Zhang (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Xingxing Guo (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Weitao Pan (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China), Yue Hao (State Key Laboratory of Integrated Service Networks, Xidian University, Xi'an, China)📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将光子尖峰神经网络与近端策略优化算法相结合，构建了面向软件定义网络智能路由的光子硬件-软件协同架构。实验验证了640个状态-动作对的高精度推理，为下一代通信网络提供了超低延迟、高能效的智
arXiv:2602.01087v1 发布类型：新 摘要：智能路由在现代通信基础设施中发挥着关键作用，包括数据中心、计算网络和未来的 6G 网络。尽管强化学习（RL）在智能路由方面展现出了巨大的潜力，但其实际部署仍然受到高能耗和决策延迟的限制。在这里，我们提出了一种光子尖峰 RL 架构，该架构实现了基于近端策略优化 (PPO) 的智能路由算法。在具有胖树拓扑的软件定义网络（SDN）上系统地评估了所提出方法的性能。结果表明，在各种基线流…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.01087v1 发布类型：新 摘要：智能路由在现代通信基础设施中发挥着关键作用，包括数据中心、计算网络和未来的 6G 网络。尽管强化学习（RL）在智能路由方面展现出了巨大的潜力，但其实际部署仍然受到高能耗和决策延迟的限制。在这里，我们提出了一种光子尖峰 RL 架构，该架构实现了基于近端策略优化 (PPO) 的智能路由算法。在具有胖树拓扑的软件定义网络（SDN）上系统地评估了所提出方法的性能。结果表明，在各种基线流量条件下，基于 PPO 的路由策略在几个关键性能指标上显着优于传统的 Dijkstra 算法。此外，利用基于马赫-曾德干涉仪（MZI）阵列的光子突触芯片和基于具有可饱和吸收器的分布式反馈激光器（DFB-SA）的光子尖峰神经元芯片，针对三种典型的基线流量实现了尖峰Actor网络的软硬件协作框架。对640个状态-动作对的实验验证表明，软硬件协同框架的推理精度与纯算法实现的推理精度一致。进一步分析了尖峰 Actor 网络中不同隐藏层规模和不同网络大小的胖树拓扑的影响。光子尖峰强化学习与基于 SDN 的路由的集成为智能路由优化建立了一种新颖的范例，具有超低延迟和高能效的特点。该方法在实时网络优化场景中展现出广阔的应用前景，包括大型数据中心、计算网络、卫星互联网系统以及未来的6G网络。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.01087v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Intelligent routing plays a key role in modern communication infrastructure, including data centers, computing networks, and future 6G networks. Although reinforcement learning (RL) has shown great potential for intelligent routing, its practical deployment remains constrained by high energy consumption and decision latency. Here, we propose a photonic spiking RL architecture that implements a proximal policy optimization (PPO)-based intelligent routing algorithm. The performance of the proposed approach is systematically evaluated on a software-defined network (SDN) with a fat-tree topology. The results demonstrate that, under various baseline traffic rate conditions, the PPO-based routing strategy significantly outperforms the conventional Dijkstra algorithm in several key performance metrics. Furthermore, a hardware-software collaborative framework of the spiking Actor network is realized for three typical baseline traffic rates, utilizing a photonic synapse chip based on a Mach-Zehnder interferometer (MZI) array and a photonic spiking neuron chip based on distributed feedback lasers with a saturable absorber (DFB-SAs). Experimental validation on 640 state-action pairs shows that the inference accuracy of the hardware-software collaborative framework is consistent with that of the pure algorithmic implementation. The impacts of different hidden-layer scales in the spiking Actor network and varying network size of fat-tree topology are further analyzed. The integration of photonic spiking RL with SDN-based routing establishes a novel paradigm for intelligent routing optimization, featuring ultra-low latency and high energy efficiency. This approach exhibits broad application prospects in real-time network optimization scenarios, including large-scale data centers, computing networks, satellite Internet systems, and future 6G networks.

82

使用物理信息神经网络从瞬态速度快照重建瞬时流场：在狭窄后面的脉动血流中的应用#

Reconstruction of instantaneous flow fields from transient velocity snapshots using physics-informed neural networks: Applications to pulsatile blood flow behind a stenosis
📚 arXiv👤 Kakeru Ueda, Hiro Wakimura, Satoshi Ii📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出了一种无显式时间输入的物理信息神经网络框架，通过推断纳维-斯托克斯方程中的加速度项，从稀疏瞬态速度快照重建脉动流场，并引入加速度失配损失提升预测精度，显著降低了时空训练成本，为4D-flow
arXiv:2602.01542v1 公告类型：新 摘要：物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 通过将偏微分方程 (PDE) 与测量数据一起嵌入到损失函数中，提供了一个有前途的框架，使其非常适合逆问题。然而，由于时空训练的高计算成本以及收敛到局部最小值的风险，标准 PINN 面临着时间相关偏微分方程的挑战。这些限制在血流动力学分析中尤其明显，其中 4D 流磁共振成像 (4D-flow MRI) 会产生心动周期内的时间稀疏速度快照。为了应对这…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.01542v1 公告类型：新 摘要：物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 通过将偏微分方程 (PDE) 与测量数据一起嵌入到损失函数中，提供了一个有前途的框架，使其非常适合逆问题。然而，由于时空训练的高计算成本以及收敛到局部最小值的风险，标准 PINN 面临着时间相关偏微分方程的挑战。这些限制在血流动力学分析中尤其明显，其中 4D 流磁共振成像 (4D-flow MRI) 会产生心动周期内的时间稀疏速度快照。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个 PINN 框架，通过推断不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程中的加速度项，从瞬态速度快照重建瞬时流场。通过设计没有明确时间作为输入的网络，所提出的方法可以仅使用空间评估来实现物理执行，从而提高训练效率，同时保持与瞬态流特性的物理一致性。此外，我们引入了加速度失配损失，它可以惩罚预测加速度和测量加速度之间的差异，从而通过正则化提高预测精度。使用时间分辨 CFD 生成的时间和空间下采样合成数据对狭窄背后的脉动流进行数值分析，结果表明，即使在稀疏时间采样下，所提出的框架也能可靠地重建速度场，并且适当的加速度正则化可改善压力梯度和加速度场的预测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.01542v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) offer a promising framework by embedding partial differential equations (PDEs) into the loss function together with measurement data, making them well-suited for inverse problems. However, standard PINNs face challenges with time-dependent PDEs due to the high computational cost of space-time training and the risk of convergence to local minima. These limitations are particularly pronounced in hemodynamic analysis, where 4D-flow magnetic resonance imaging (4D-flow MRI) yields temporally sparse velocity snapshots over the cardiac cycle. To address this challenge, we propose a PINN framework that reconstructs instantaneous flow fields from transient velocity snapshots by inferring the acceleration term in the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations. By designing the network without explicit time as an input, the proposed approach enables physics enforcement using spatial evaluations alone, improving training efficiency while maintaining physical consistency with transient flow characteristics. In addition, we introduce an acceleration-mismatch loss that penalizes discrepancies between predicted and measured accelerations, which improves prediction accuracy through regularization. Numerical examples on pulsatile flow behind a stenosis using temporally and spatially downsampled synthetic data generated from time-resolved CFD demonstrate that the proposed framework reliably reconstructs velocity fields even under sparse temporal sampling, and appropriate regularization for acceleration improves predictions of pressure-gradient and acceleration fields.

83

参数偏微分方程的物理知识切比雪夫多项式神经算子#

Physics-Informed Chebyshev Polynomial Neural Operator for Parametric Partial Differential Equations
📚 arXiv👤 Biao Chen, Jing Wang, Hairun Xie, Qineng Wang, Shuai Zhang, Yifan Xia, Jifa Zhang📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出物理知识切比雪夫多项式神经算子（CPNO），以切比雪夫谱基替代MLP的单项式展开，通过参数相关调制机制解耦模型与MLP约束，显著缓解谱偏差、改善条件数与梯度稳定性，在参数化偏微分方程及跨音速
arXiv:2602.01737v1 公告类型：新 摘要：神经算子已成为强大的深度学习框架，用于逼近参数化偏微分方程 (PDE) 的解算子。然而，当前的方法主要依赖多层感知器（MLP）将输入映射到解决方案，由于固有的谱偏差和固定的激活函数，这削弱了物理信息设置中的训练鲁棒性。为了克服架构限制，我们引入了基于物理的切比雪夫多项式神经算子（CPNO），这是一种新颖的无网格框架，它利用基变换以数值稳定的切比雪夫谱基代替不稳定的单项式展开。通…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.01737v1 公告类型：新 摘要：神经算子已成为强大的深度学习框架，用于逼近参数化偏微分方程 (PDE) 的解算子。然而，当前的方法主要依赖多层感知器（MLP）将输入映射到解决方案，由于固有的谱偏差和固定的激活函数，这削弱了物理信息设置中的训练鲁棒性。为了克服架构限制，我们引入了基于物理的切比雪夫多项式神经算子（CPNO），这是一种新颖的无网格框架，它利用基变换以数值稳定的切比雪夫谱基代替不稳定的单项式展开。通过将参数相关的调制机制集成到主网，CPNO 在接近最优的函数空间中构建 PDE 解决方案，将模型与 MLP 特定的约束解耦并增强多尺度表示。理论分析证明了切比雪夫基的近极小极大均匀逼近特性和优越的条件作用，勒贝格常数随度数呈对数增长，从而减轻谱偏差并确保优化期间稳定的梯度流。基准参数化偏微分方程的数值实验表明，CPNO 实现了卓越的精度、更快的收敛速度以及对超参数的增强的鲁棒性。跨音速翼型流实验证明了CPNO表征复杂几何问题的能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.01737v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neural operators have emerged as powerful deep learning frameworks for approximating solution operators of parameterized partial differential equations (PDE). However, current methods predominantly rely on multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) for mapping inputs to solutions, which impairs training robustness in physics-informed settings due to inherent spectral biases and fixed activation functions. To overcome the architectural limitations, we introduce the Physics-Informed Chebyshev Polynomial Neural Operator (CPNO), a novel mesh-free framework that leverages a basis transformation to replace unstable monomial expansions with the numerically stable Chebyshev spectral basis. By integrating parameter dependent modulation mechanism to main net, CPNO constructs PDE solutions in a near-optimal functional space, decoupling the model from MLP-specific constraints and enhancing multi-scale representation. Theoretical analysis demonstrates the Chebyshev basis's near-minimax uniform approximation properties and superior conditioning, with Lebesgue constants growing logarithmically with degree, thereby mitigating spectral bias and ensuring stable gradient flow during optimization. Numerical experiments on benchmark parameterized PDEs show that CPNO achieves superior accuracy, faster convergence, and enhanced robustness to hyperparameters. The experiment of transonic airfoil flow has demonstrated the capability of CPNO in characterizing complex geometric problems.

84

机器学习揭示海洋在大气快速演化中的作用#

Role of the ocean for fast atmospheric evolution revealed by machine learning
📚 arXiv👤 Bobby Antonio, Kristian Strommen, Hannah M. Christensen📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将MLWP模型忽略海洋输入的局限转化为优势，通过分析GraphCast的预测误差与海气界面特性的关联，反推大气模拟器仅从大气数据中能隐式推断哪些海洋信息，从而识别海洋在快速时间尺度上独立影响大气
arXiv:2602.01904v1 公告类型：新 摘要：最近，人们做出了许多努力来创建旨在取代物理模型的机器学习大气模拟器。到目前为止，这些主要集中在中期天气预报，这些“机器学习天气预报”（MLWP）模型可以超越领先的业务预报中心。然而，由于关注较短的时间尺度，许多模拟器忽略了海洋的影响，并且不采用海洋变量作为输入。我们假设，此类 MLWP 模型通过从大气状态隐式推断海洋状况，无需获取海洋数据，就已经学会了对大气演化的最佳猜测。将这…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.01904v1 公告类型：新 摘要：最近，人们做出了许多努力来创建旨在取代物理模型的机器学习大气模拟器。到目前为止，这些主要集中在中期天气预报，这些“机器学习天气预报”（MLWP）模型可以超越领先的业务预报中心。然而，由于关注较短的时间尺度，许多模拟器忽略了海洋的影响，并且不采用海洋变量作为输入。我们假设，此类 MLWP 模型通过从大气状态隐式推断海洋状况，无需获取海洋数据，就已经学会了对大气演化的最佳猜测。将这种限制转化为优势，我们用它作为研究海洋对大气演化的作用的手段。通过探索模型预测误差与海气界面特性的关系，我们推断出这些大气模拟器能够仅从大气数据中得出哪些海洋信息，以及不能得出哪些信息。这突出了海洋在快速时间尺度上独立影响大气的区域和过程。我们对 GraphCast 进行此分析，发现海气特性与海洋预测误差之间的明确关系，包括明显的季节性影响。然后我们探索这揭示了 GraphCast 海洋的内部表征。除了了解现实世界的海洋-大气相互作用之外，该分析还为提高 MLWP 模型的预测技能和物理真实性提供指导，并告知未来的机器学习模型应如何在短时间尺度上使用海洋信息。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.01904v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: There have recently been many efforts to create machine learnt atmospheric emulators designed to replace physical models. So far these have mainly focused on medium-range weather forecasting, where these `Machine Learnt Weather Prediction' (MLWP) models can outperform leading operational forecasting centres. However, because of this focus on shorter timescales, many of these emulators ignore the effects of the ocean, and take no ocean variables as inputs. We hypothesise that such MLWP models have learnt a best-guess of the evolution of the atmosphere, by implicitly inferring ocean conditions from atmospheric states, with no access to ocean data. Turning this limitation into a strength, we use it as a means to study the role of the oceans on the evolution of the atmosphere. By exploring how model forecast errors relate to properties of the air-sea interface, we infer what ocean information these atmospheric emulators are able to derive from atmospheric data alone, and what they cannot. This highlights the regions and processes through which the ocean independently influences the atmosphere on fast timescales. We perform this analysis for GraphCast, finding clear relationships between air-sea properties and the forecast errors over the ocean, including clear seasonal effects. We then explore what this reveals about GraphCast's internal representation of the ocean. In addition to understanding real-world ocean-atmosphere interactions, this analysis provides guidance for improving forecast skill and physical realism in MLWP models, and for informing how future machine learning models should use ocean information on short timescales.

85

将先验从远偏移传播到近偏移：用于逐步恢复拖缆数据近偏移的自监督扩散框架#

Propagating the prior from far to near offset: A self-supervised diffusion framework for progressively recovering near-offsets of towed-streamer data
📚 arXiv👤 Shijun Cheng, Tariq Alkhalifah📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：提出首个无需近偏移参考数据的自监督扩散框架，通过远偏移单道重叠 patch 训练条件扩散模型，并以逐道递归外推将先验从远偏移传播至近偏移，实现缺失近偏移的逐步重建；集成采样提供不确定性估计，突破了有监
arXiv:2602.01909v1 公告类型：新 摘要：在海洋拖缆地震采集中，最近的水听器通常距离震源 200 米，导致近炮检距迹线缺失，从而降低了关键处理工作流程，例如与表面相关的多重消除、速度分析和全波形反演。现有的重建方法（例如变换域插值）通常会产生运动学不一致和幅度失真，而有监督的深度学习方法需要完整的地面实况近偏移数据，而这在实际采集场景中是不可用的。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于自监督扩散的框架，该框架可以重建丢失…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.01909v1 公告类型：新 摘要：在海洋拖缆地震采集中，最近的水听器通常距离震源 200 米，导致近炮检距迹线缺失，从而降低了关键处理工作流程，例如与表面相关的多重消除、速度分析和全波形反演。现有的重建方法（例如变换域插值）通常会产生运动学不一致和幅度失真，而有监督的深度学习方法需要完整的地面实况近偏移数据，而这在实际采集场景中是不可用的。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于自监督扩散的框架，该框架可以重建丢失的近偏移轨迹，而不需要近偏移参考数据。我们的方法利用来自可用远偏移部分的单迹线偏移的重叠补丁提取来训练条件扩散模型，该模型学习控制事件曲率、幅度变化和小波特征的偏移相关统计模式。在推理时，我们从最近记录的偏移量向零偏移量执行逐迹线递归外推，逐渐将学习到的先验信息从远偏移量传播到近偏移量。生成公式进一步通过集成采样提供不确定性估计，在缺乏验证数据的情况下量化预测置信度。对合成数据集和现场数据集的受控验证实验表明，与传统的抛物线氡变换基线相比，性能有了显着的提升。在实际的近偏移间隙上进行作战部署证明了在不可能进行地面实况验证的情况下的实际可行性。值得注意的是，尽管专门针对远偏移观测进行训练，重建的波形仍保留了真实的幅度与偏移的趋势，并且不确定性图准确地识别了具有挑战性的外推区域。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.01909v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In marine towed-streamer seismic acquisition, the nearest hydrophone is often two hundred meter away from the source resulting in missing near-offset traces, which degrades critical processing workflows such as surface-related multiple elimination, velocity analysis, and full-waveform inversion. Existing reconstruction methods, like transform-domain interpolation, often produce kinematic inconsistencies and amplitude distortions, while supervised deep learning approaches require complete ground-truth near-offset data that are unavailable in realistic acquisition scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose a self-supervised diffusion-based framework that reconstructs missing near-offset traces without requiring near-offset reference data. Our method leverages overlapping patch extraction with single-trace shifts from the available far-offset section to train a conditional diffusion model, which learns offset-dependent statistical patterns governing event curvature, amplitude variation, and wavelet characteristics. At inference, we perform trace-by-trace recursive extrapolation from the nearest recorded offset toward zero offset, progressively propagating learned prior information from far to near offsets. The generative formulation further provides uncertainty estimates via ensemble sampling, quantifying prediction confidence where validation data are absent. Controlled validation experiments on synthetic and field datasets show substantial performance gains over conventional parabolic Radon transform baselines. Operational deployment on actual near-offset gaps demonstrates practical viability where ground-truth validation is impossible. Notably, the reconstructed waveforms preserve realistic amplitude-versus-offset trends despite training exclusively on far-offset observations, and uncertainty maps accurately identify challenging extrapolation regions.

86

促进纳米光子学信息驱动研究的 T 矩阵数据库#

A T-matrix database to promote information-driven research in nanophotonics
📚 arXiv👤 Nigar Asadova, Kaoutar Boussaoud, Jörg Meyer, Frank Tristram, Carsten Rockstuhl📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究构建了首个开源T矩阵数据库门户Daphona，通过统一元数据与标准格式打破数据孤岛，为纳米光子学的机器学习正向代理与逆向设计提供可直接调用的基础数据层，显著降低重复计算成本并加速信息驱动研究。
arXiv:2602.02101v1 公告类型：新 摘要：来自机器学习和人工智能的信息驱动方法，用于探索超表面的光学响应，更一般地说，光子系统依赖于注释良好的数据集进行训练。对于由周期性或非周期性散射体排列制成的超表面，编码其响应的主要信息是这些单独散射体的光学特性。在线性区域中，该响应完全包含在单个散射体的过渡或 T 矩阵中。然而，尽管这些 T 矩阵在更大的社区内探索先进光子材料时得到了广泛使用，但没有通用的基础设施来以一致的元数据…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.02101v1 公告类型：新 摘要：来自机器学习和人工智能的信息驱动方法，用于探索超表面的光学响应，更一般地说，光子系统依赖于注释良好的数据集进行训练。对于由周期性或非周期性散射体排列制成的超表面，编码其响应的主要信息是这些单独散射体的光学特性。在线性区域中，该响应完全包含在单个散射体的过渡或 T 矩阵中。然而，尽管这些 T 矩阵在更大的社区内探索先进光子材料时得到了广泛使用，但没有通用的基础设施来以一致的元数据和标准表示形式分发它们。这对于避免世界各地的研究人员对这些 T 矩阵进行重复的、资源密集型的计算并实现数据驱动的研究非常重要。为了克服这一限制，我们引入了 Daphona T 矩阵门户 https://tmatrix.scc.kit.edu/，这是一个基于 Web 的平台，用于交互式搜索、过滤和导出包含各种散射体的结构-属性关系的标准化数据，如其 T 矩阵所示。除了介绍这种基础设施之外，我们还演示了可用数据如何能够在更广泛的信息驱动研究背景下解决科学问题。我们的贡献中的多个说明性示例涵盖了代理正向模型和逆向设计模型，并且直接在 T 矩阵上操作，或者在由这些散射体制成的超表面的光学可观测量上操作。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.02101v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Information-driven methods from machine learning and artificial intelligence for exploring the optical response of metasurfaces and, more generally, photonic systems rely on well-annotated datasets for training. For metasurfaces made from a periodic or aperiodic arrangement of scatterers, the primary information encoding their response is the optical properties of these individual scatterers. In the linear regime, that response is entirely contained in the transition or T-matrix of the individual scatterer. However, despite the widespread use of these T-matrices in exploring advanced photonic materials within the larger community, there is no common infrastructure for distributing them with consistent metadata and a standard representation. That would be important to avoid the repetitive, resource-intensive computation of these T-matrices by researchers worldwide and to enable data-driven research. To overcome this limitation, we introduce the Daphona T-matrix portal at https://tmatrix.scc.kit.edu/, a web-based platform for interactive searching, filtering, and exporting standardized data containing structure-property relations for a wide range of scatterers, as expressed by their T-matrices. Besides introducing this infrastructure, we demonstrate how the available data enables addressing scientific questions in the broader context of information-driven research. The multiple illustrative examples in our contribution cover both surrogate forward models and inverse design models, and operate either directly on the T-matrix or alternatively on optical observables of metasurfaces made from these scatterers.

87

基于原型的可解释神经网络，具有针对地理空间学习任务的特定通道推理#

Prototype-based Explainable Neural Networks with Channel-specific Reasoning for Geospatial Learning Tasks
📚 arXiv👤 Anushka Narayanan, Karianne J. Bergen📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究针对多通道地理空间数据开发了基于原型的可解释神经网络，核心创新在于实现通道级原型学习，使模型能独立识别各物理变量或光谱通道的原型特征，并揭示其单独与组合作用机制。该方法兼具标准神经网络的预测性能
arXiv:2602.00331v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 对于理解机器学习 (ML) 决策和确保科学应用中模型的可信度至关重要。基于原型的 XAI 方法为事后方法提供了本质上可解释的替代方案，而事后方法通常会产生不一致的解释。基于原型的 XAI 方法根据输入和代表目标类典型特征的学习原型之间的相似性进行预测。然而，现有的基于原型的模型主要是针对标准 RGB 图像数据而设计的，并未针对地球科学图像和栅格数…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.00331v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 对于理解机器学习 (ML) 决策和确保科学应用中模型的可信度至关重要。基于原型的 XAI 方法为事后方法提供了本质上可解释的替代方案，而事后方法通常会产生不一致的解释。基于原型的 XAI 方法根据输入和代表目标类典型特征的学习原型之间的相似性进行预测。然而，现有的基于原型的模型主要是针对标准 RGB 图像数据而设计的，并未针对地球科学图像和栅格数据集中常见的独特的、特定于变量的通道进行优化。在本研究中，我们开发了一种针对多通道地理空间数据的基于原型的 XAI 方法，其中每个通道代表一个不同的物理环境变量或光谱通道。我们的方法使模型能够识别来自多个不同训练示例的单独的、特定于通道的原型特征，这些训练示例告知这些特征如何单独和组合影响模型预测，同时实现与标准神经网络相当的性能。我们通过两个地球科学案例研究演示了这种方法：（1）使用多变量气候数据对马登朱利安振荡阶段进行分类，以及（2）根据多光谱卫星图像进行土地利用分类。这种方法产生本地（实例级）和全局（模型级）解释，以提供跨渠道特征相关性的见解。通过将通道原型明确地纳入预测过程，我们讨论了这种方法如何增强地球科学学习任务的 ML 模型的透明度和可信度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.00331v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) is essential for understanding machine learning (ML) decision-making and ensuring model trustworthiness in scientific applications. Prototype-based XAI methods offer an intrinsically interpretable alternative to post-hoc approaches which often yield inconsistent explanations. Prototype-based XAI methods make predictions based on the similarity between inputs and learned prototypes that represent typical characteristics of target classes. However, existing prototype-based models are primarily designed for standard RGB image data and are not optimized for the distinct, variable-specific channels commonly found in geoscientific image and raster datasets. In this study, we develop a prototype-based XAI approach tailored for multi-channel geospatial data, where each channel represents a distinct physical environmental variable or spectral channel. Our approach enables the model to identify separate, channel-specific prototypical characteristics sourced from multiple distinct training examples that inform how these features individually and in combination influence model prediction while achieving comparable performance to standard neural networks. We demonstrate this method through two geoscientific case studies: (1) classification of Madden Julian Oscillation phases using multi-variable climate data and (2) land-use classification from multispectral satellite imagery. This approach produces both local (instance-level) and global (model-level) explanations for providing insights into feature-relevance across channels. By explicitly incorporating channel-prototypes into the prediction process, we discuss how this approach enhances the transparency and trustworthiness of ML models for geoscientific learning tasks.

88

具有贝叶斯不确定性量化和自适应残差学习的多保真物理神经网络可有效求解参数偏微分方程#

Multi-Fidelity Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Bayesian Uncertainty Quantification and Adaptive Residual Learning for Efficient Solution of Parametric Partial Differential Equations
📚 arXiv👤 Olaf Yunus Laitinen Imanov📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：提出MF-BPINN框架，将多保真数据融合、自适应残差学习与贝叶斯不确定性量化相结合，突破高保真参数化偏微分方程求解的计算瓶颈，为复杂物理系统的快速可靠代理建模提供了新途径。
arXiv:2602.01176v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 已成为通过将物理定律直接嵌入到神经网络训练中来求解偏微分方程 (PDE) 的强大范例。然而，求解高保真偏微分方程在计算上仍然令人望而却步，特别是对于需要跨不同参数配置进行多次评估的参数系统。本文提出了 MF-BPINN，这是一种新颖的多保真度框架，它将物理信息神经网络与贝叶斯不确定性量化和自适应残差学习协同结合起来。我们的方法通过分层神经…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.01176v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 已成为通过将物理定律直接嵌入到神经网络训练中来求解偏微分方程 (PDE) 的强大范例。然而，求解高保真偏微分方程在计算上仍然令人望而却步，特别是对于需要跨不同参数配置进行多次评估的参数系统。本文提出了 MF-BPINN，这是一种新颖的多保真度框架，它将物理信息神经网络与贝叶斯不确定性量化和自适应残差学习协同结合起来。我们的方法通过分层神经架构利用丰富的低保真模拟和稀疏的高保真数据，该架构可以学习跨保真度级别的非线性相关性。我们引入了一种具有可学习门控机制的自适应残差网络，可以动态平衡线性和非线性保真度差异。此外，我们利用哈密顿蒙特卡罗开发了严格的贝叶斯框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.01176v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for solving partial differential equations (PDEs) by embedding physical laws directly into neural network training. However, solving high-fidelity PDEs remains computationally prohibitive, particularly for parametric systems requiring multiple evaluations across varying parameter configurations. This paper presents MF-BPINN, a novel multi-fidelity framework that synergistically combines physics-informed neural networks with Bayesian uncertainty quantification and adaptive residual learning. Our approach leverages abundant low-fidelity simulations alongside sparse high-fidelity data through a hierarchical neural architecture that learns nonlinear correlations across fidelity levels. We introduce an adaptive residual network with learnable gating mechanisms that dynamically balances linear and nonlinear fidelity discrepancies. Furthermore, we develop a rigorous Bayesian framework employing Hamiltonian Monte Carlo.

89

非变分启发式量子优化方法#

Methods for non-variational heuristic quantum optimisation
📚 arXiv👤 Stuart Ferguson, Petros Wallden📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破变分框架，提出基于MCMC的混合量子-经典优化启发式算法QeSA与QePT，在困难SK实例上展现优于经典基准的扩展性，为NISQ时代大规模优化问题提供了可扩展、抗噪声且仅需经典通信的新途径。
arXiv:2602.01353v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：优化在广泛的科学和工业应用中发挥着核心作用，量子计算已被广泛提出作为在该领域实现计算优势的手段。迄今为止，抗噪声量子算法的设计研究主要以变分方法为主，而替代方法仍然相对未经探索。在这项工作中，我们引入了一类新颖的量子优化启发式算法，它放弃了这种变分框架，转而采用基于马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗（MCMC）技术的混合量子经典方法。我们介绍了量子增强模拟退火 (QeSA) 和量子增强…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.01353v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：优化在广泛的科学和工业应用中发挥着核心作用，量子计算已被广泛提出作为在该领域实现计算优势的手段。迄今为止，抗噪声量子算法的设计研究主要以变分方法为主，而替代方法仍然相对未经探索。在这项工作中，我们引入了一类新颖的量子优化启发式算法，它放弃了这种变分框架，转而采用基于马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗（MCMC）技术的混合量子经典方法。我们介绍了量子增强模拟退火 (QeSA) 和量子增强并行回火 (QePT)，然后在硬 Sherrington-Kirkpatrick 实例上验证这些启发式方法，并展示它们相对于经典基准的卓越扩展性。这些算法预计将表现出固有的抗噪声鲁棒性，并支持跨量子和经典资源的并行执行，仅需要经典通信。因此，它们为解决近期量子设备的大规模优化问题提供了一条可扩展且具有潜在竞争力的途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.01353v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Optimisation plays a central role in a wide range of scientific and industrial applications, and quantum computing has been widely proposed as a means to achieve computational advantages in this domain. To date, research into the design of noise-resilient quantum algorithms has been dominated by variational approaches, while alternatives remain relatively unexplored. In this work, we introduce a novel class of quantum optimisation heuristics that forgo this variational framework in favour of a hybrid quantum-classical approach built upon Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) techniques. We introduce Quantum-enhanced Simulated Annealing (QeSA) and Quantum-enhanced Parallel Tempering (QePT), before validating these heuristics on hard Sherrington-Kirkpatrick instances and demonstrate their superior scaling over classical benchmarks. These algorithms are expected to exhibit inherent robustness to noise and support parallel execution across both quantum and classical resources with only classical communication required. As such, they offer a scalable and potentially competitive route toward solving large-scale optimisation problems with near-term quantum devices.

90

在 GROMACS 中实现从头开始质量分子动力学模拟的 AI 深层潜力#

Enabling AI Deep Potentials for Ab Initio-quality Molecular Dynamics Simulations in GROMACS
📚 arXiv👤 Andong Hu, Luca Pennati, Stefano Markidis, Ivy Peng📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将DeePMD-kit深度势能集成至GROMACS，实现了跨模型架构与CUDA后端的高效推理，并系统对比了DPA2与DPA3在蛋白质体系中的性能差异，为大规模从头算质量分子动力学模拟提供了生产级
arXiv:2602.02234v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：最先进的人工智能深势能提供从头算质量的结果，但其计算成本仅为第一原理量子力学计算（例如密度泛函理论）的一小部分。在这项工作中，我们通过与提供原子间势能和力场的特定领域深度学习 (DL) 模型的 DeePMD-kit 集成，将 AI 深度潜力引入生产级分子动力学 (MD) 代码 GROMACS。特别是，我们通过将 GROMACS 神经网络势与 DeePMD-kit 中的…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2602.02234v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：最先进的人工智能深势能提供从头算质量的结果，但其计算成本仅为第一原理量子力学计算（例如密度泛函理论）的一小部分。在这项工作中，我们通过与提供原子间势能和力场的特定领域深度学习 (DL) 模型的 DeePMD-kit 集成，将 AI 深度潜力引入生产级分子动力学 (MD) 代码 GROMACS。特别是，我们通过将 GROMACS 神经网络势与 DeePMD-kit 中的 C++/CUDA 后端耦合，实现跨多个 DP 模型系列和 DL 后端的 AI 深度势推理。我们在 NVIDIA A100 和 GH200 GPU 上使用四个从头开始质量的水中蛋白质基准（1YRF、1UBQ、3LZM、2PTC）在 GROMACS 中评估了两种最新的大原子模型架构，即基于注意力机制的 DPA2 和基于 GNN 的 DPA3。我们的结果表明，在 A100 和 GH200 GPU 上，DPA2 的吞吐量分别比 DPA3 高 4.23 倍和 3.18 倍。我们还提供了一项特性研究，以进一步对比 DPA2 和 DPA3 在吞吐量、内存使用和 GPU 上的内核级执行方面的差异。我们的研究结果表明，内核启动开销和领域分解推理是生产 MD 模拟中 AI 深度潜力的主要优化优先事项。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.02234v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: State-of-the-art AI deep potentials provide ab initio-quality results, but at a fraction of the computational cost of first-principles quantum mechanical calculations, such as density functional theory. In this work, we bring AI deep potentials into GROMACS, a production-level Molecular Dynamics (MD) code, by integrating with DeePMD-kit that provides domain-specific deep learning (DL) models of interatomic potential energy and force fields. In particular, we enable AI deep potentials inference across multiple DP model families and DL backends by coupling GROMACS Neural Network Potentials with the C++/CUDA backend in DeePMD-kit. We evaluate two recent large-atom-model architectures, DPA2 that is based on the attention mechanism and DPA3 that is based on GNN, in GROMACS using four ab initio-quality protein-in-water benchmarks (1YRF, 1UBQ, 3LZM, 2PTC) on NVIDIA A100 and GH200 GPUs. Our results show that DPA2 delivers up to 4.23x and 3.18x higher throughput than DPA3 on A100 and GH200 GPUs, respectively. We also provide a characterization study to further contrast DPA2 and DPA3 in throughput, memory usage, and kernel-level execution on GPUs. Our findings identify kernel-launch overhead and domain-decomposed inference as the main optimization priorities for AI deep potentials in production MD simulations.

91

EquiNO：用于多尺度模拟的物理信息神经算子#

EquiNO: A Physics-Informed Neural Operator for Multiscale Simulations
📚 arXiv👤 Hamidreza Eivazi, Jendrik-Alexander Tröger, Stefan Wittek, Stefan Hartmann, Andreas Rausch📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：EquiNO通过POD无散基函数将解投影嵌入平衡约束，实现物理定律的严格保证而非惩罚式弱约束；结合有限元与算子学习提出FE-OL方法，为固体力学多尺度模拟构建了兼具计算效率与物理一致性的新框架。
arXiv:2504.07976v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：多尺度问题在物理学中普遍存在。通过以高分辨率求解偏微分方程 (PDE) 来对此类问题进行数值模拟对于许多查询场景（例如不确定性量化、重新划分应用程序和拓扑优化）来说计算成本太高。这种限制促进了数据驱动替代模型的发展，其中微观尺度计算被宏观尺度量之间的黑盒映射所取代。虽然这些方法提供了显着的加速，但它们通常难以纳入微观物理约束，例如线性动量的平衡。在这篇文章中，我们提出了平衡神…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2504.07976v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：多尺度问题在物理学中普遍存在。通过以高分辨率求解偏微分方程 (PDE) 来对此类问题进行数值模拟对于许多查询场景（例如不确定性量化、重新划分应用程序和拓扑优化）来说计算成本太高。这种限制促进了数据驱动替代模型的发展，其中微观尺度计算被宏观尺度量之间的黑盒映射所取代。虽然这些方法提供了显着的加速，但它们通常难以纳入微观物理约束，例如线性动量的平衡。在这篇文章中，我们提出了平衡神经算子（EquiNO），这是一种基于物理的偏微分方程替代项，其中平衡是通过构造来强制执行的。 EquiNO 通过将解投影到一组通过适当的正交分解 (POD) 获得的无散基函数上来实现这一点，从而确保满足平衡而不依赖于惩罚项或多目标损失函数。我们将 EquiNO 与变分物理通知的神经网络和算子网络进行比较，这些网络仅通过损失函数微弱地施加物理约束，以及纯粹的数据驱动的算子学习基线。我们的框架适用于多尺度 FE,² 计算，引入了有限元算子学习（FE-OL）方法，该方法将有限元（FE）方法与算子学习（OL）相结合。我们将所提出的方法应用于固体力学中的准静态问题，并证明即使在受限数据集上进行训练，FE-OL 也能产生准确的解决方案。结果表明，与传统方法相比，EquiNO 的加速因子超过 8000 倍，并为现有的数据驱动替代模型提供了强大且物理一致的替代方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2504.07976v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Multiscale problems are ubiquitous in physics. Numerical simulations of such problems by solving partial differential equations (PDEs) at high resolution are computationally too expensive for many-query scenarios, such as uncertainty quantification, remeshing applications, and topology optimization. This limitation has motivated the development of data-driven surrogate models, where microscale computations are substituted by black-box mappings between macroscale quantities. While these approaches offer significant speedups, they typically struggle to incorporate microscale physical constraints, such as the balance of linear momentum. In this contribution, we propose the Equilibrium Neural Operator (EquiNO), a physics-informed PDE surrogate in which equilibrium is hard-enforced by construction. EquiNO achieves this by projecting the solution onto a set of divergence-free basis functions obtained via proper orthogonal decomposition (POD), thereby ensuring satisfaction of equilibrium without relying on penalty terms or multi-objective loss functions. We compare EquiNO with variational physics-informed neural and operator networks that enforce physical constraints only weakly through the loss function, as well as with purely data-driven operator-learning baselines. Our framework, applicable to multiscale FE,² computations, introduces a finite element-operator learning (FE-OL) approach that integrates the finite element (FE) method with operator learning (OL). We apply the proposed methodology to quasi-static problems in solid mechanics and demonstrate that FE-OL yields accurate solutions even when trained on restricted datasets. The results show that EquiNO achieves speedup factors exceeding 8000-fold compared to traditional methods and offers a robust and physically consistent alternative to existing data-driven surrogate models.

92

通过稀疏网格加速优化动态模式分解快速预测等离子体不稳定性#

Fast prediction of plasma instabilities with sparse-grid-accelerated optimized dynamic mode decomposition
📚 arXiv👤 Kevin Gill, Ionut-Gabriel Farcas, Silke Glas, Benjamin J. Faber📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出以(L)-Leja稀疏网格替代传统全网格采样，结合优化动态模式分解（optDMD），构建高维参数空间下等离子体微不稳定性的降阶模型。核心创新在于利用嵌套且增长缓慢的Leja点缓解维数灾难，显著
arXiv:2507.03245v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：在大量输入参数中嵌入依赖关系的参数化数据驱动的降阶模型 (ROM) 对于在大规模问题中实现多查询任务至关重要。这些任务，包括设计优化、控制和不确定性量化，对于在现实应用中开发数字孪生至关重要。然而，由于维数灾难，标准的基于网格的数据生成方法在计算上是令人望而却步的。本文研究了使用 (L)-Leja 点的稀疏网格插值对参数数据驱动的 ROM 进行有效训练，特别针对具有更高维输入…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2507.03245v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：在大量输入参数中嵌入依赖关系的参数化数据驱动的降阶模型 (ROM) 对于在大规模问题中实现多查询任务至关重要。这些任务，包括设计优化、控制和不确定性量化，对于在现实应用中开发数字孪生至关重要。然而，由于维数灾难，标准的基于网格的数据生成方法在计算上是令人望而却步的。本文研究了使用 (L)-Leja 点的稀疏网格插值对参数数据驱动的 ROM 进行有效训练，特别针对具有更高维输入参数空间的场景。 (L)-Leja 点是嵌套的并表现出缓慢的增长，导致中低维设置中基数较低的稀疏网格，使其成为大规模、计算成本较高的问题的理想选择。重点关注聚变实验中等离子体微不稳定性的回旋模拟作为代表性的现实应用，我们通过优化动态模式分解（optDMD）和基于（L）-Leja点的稀疏网格构建完整5D回旋分布函数的参数ROM。我们在两种场景中进行详细的实验：首先，Cyclone Base Case 基准测试评估 optDMD ROM 超出训练时间范围和跨副法线波数变化的预测能力。其次，对于具有六个输入参数的现实世界电子温度梯度驱动的微不稳定性模拟，我们证明了仅使用 28 个高保真回旋运动模拟即可构建预测参数 optDMD ROM，其评估成本可降低三个数量级，并通过使用稀疏网格来实现。在更广泛的融合研究背景下，这些结果证明了基于稀疏网格的参数 ROM 的潜力，可以实现原本棘手的多查询任务。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.03245v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Parametric data-driven reduced-order models (ROMs) that embed dependencies in a large number of input parameters are crucial for enabling many-query tasks in large-scale problems. These tasks, including design optimization, control, and uncertainty quantification, are essential for developing digital twins in real-world applications. However, standard grid-based data generation methods are computationally prohibitive due to the curse of dimensionality. This paper investigates efficient training of parametric data-driven ROMs using sparse grid interpolation with (L)-Leja points, specifically targeting scenarios with higher-dimensional input parameter spaces. (L)-Leja points are nested and exhibit slow growth, resulting in sparse grids with low cardinality in low-to-medium dimensional settings, making them ideal for large-scale, computationally expensive problems. Focusing on gyrokinetic simulations of plasma micro-instabilities in fusion experiments as a representative real-world application, we construct parametric ROMs for the full 5D gyrokinetic distribution function via optimized dynamic mode decomposition (optDMD) and sparse grids based on (L)-Leja points. We perform detailed experiments in two scenarios: First, the Cyclone Base Case benchmark assesses optDMD ROM prediction capabilities beyond training time horizons and across variations in the binormal wave number. Second, for a real-world electron-temperature-gradient-driven micro-instability simulation with six input parameters, we demonstrate that a predictive parametric optDMD ROM that is up to three orders of magnitude cheaper to evaluate can be constructed using only 28 high-fidelity gyrokinetic simulations, enabled by the use of sparse grids. In the broader context of fusion research, these results demonstrate the potential of sparse grid-based parametric ROMs to enable otherwise intractable many-query tasks.

93

QCell：涵盖多种生物分子片段的综合量子力学数据集#

QCell: Comprehensive Quantum-Mechanical Dataset Spanning Diverse Biomolecular Fragments
📚 arXiv👤 Adil Kabylda, Sergio Suárez-Dou, Nils Davoine, Florian N. Brünig, Alexandre Tkatchenko📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：QCell构建了覆盖糖类、核酸、脂质、二聚体及离子簇等全类别生物分子片段的52.5万条高质量量子力学数据集，采用混合密度泛函理论计算，填补了现有数据在化学多样性与非经验近似方面的关键空白，为开发能够模
arXiv:2510.09939v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：机器学习力场 (MLFF) 的最新进展通过弥合量子力学 (QM) 精度和机械势计算效率之间的差距，正在彻底改变分子模拟。然而，用于生物分子系统的可靠 MLFF 的开发仍然受到缺乏高质量、化学多样化的 QM 数据集的限制，这些数据集涵盖了活细胞中表达的所有主要生物分子类别。至关重要的是，这样一个全面的数据集必须使用非经验或最小经验近似来计算，以求解 Schrödinger 方程…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2510.09939v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：机器学习力场 (MLFF) 的最新进展通过弥合量子力学 (QM) 精度和机械势计算效率之间的差距，正在彻底改变分子模拟。然而，用于生物分子系统的可靠 MLFF 的开发仍然受到缺乏高质量、化学多样化的 QM 数据集的限制，这些数据集涵盖了活细胞中表达的所有主要生物分子类别。至关重要的是，这样一个全面的数据集必须使用非经验或最小经验近似来计算，以求解 Schrödinger 方程。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 QCell 数据集 - 一个针对生物分子片段（包括碳水化合物、核酸、脂质、二聚体和离子簇）的 525k 新 QM 计算的精选集合。QCell 补充了现有数据集，使可用数据点总数达到 4100 万个分子系统，所有这些都使用混合密度计算因此，QCell 数据集为训练下一代 MLFF 提供了宝贵的资源，该 MLFF 能够模拟控制小分子和蛋白质之外的生物分子动力学的复杂相互作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.09939v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent advances in machine learning force fields (MLFFs) are revolutionizing molecular simulations by bridging the gap between quantum-mechanical (QM) accuracy and the computational efficiency of mechanistic potentials. However, the development of reliable MLFFs for biomolecular systems remains constrained by the scarcity of high-quality, chemically diverse QM datasets that span all of the major classes of biomolecules expressed in living cells. Crucially, such a comprehensive dataset must be computed using non-empirical or minimally empirical approximations to solving the Schrödinger equation. To address these limitations, we introduce the QCell dataset -- a curated collection of 525k new QM calculations for biomolecular fragments encompassing carbohydrates, nucleic acids, lipids, dimers, and ion clusters. QCell complements existing datasets, bringing the total number of available data points to 41 million molecular systems, all calculated using hybrid density functional theory with nonlocal many-body dispersion interactions, as captured by the PBE0+MBD(-NL) level of quantum mechanics. The QCell dataset therefore provides a valuable resource for training next-generation MLFFs capable of modeling the intricate interactions that govern biomolecular dynamics beyond small molecules and proteins.

94

等离子体中中性粒子输运建模的机器学习方法#

Machine Learning approach to modeling of neutral particles transport in plasma
📚 arXiv👤 M. V. Umansky, G. J. Parker, R. D. Smirnov📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将神经网络与格林函数（传播子）结合，为聚变边界等离子体中性粒子输运提供快速精确的替代求解方案，突破了传统蒙特卡罗效率瓶颈，并兼容雅可比行列式时间积分与寻根方法，对聚变模拟加速具有重要潜力。
arXiv:2510.23088v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：研究了一种基于传播器的方法，用于聚变边界等离子体中中性粒子输运的蒙特卡罗 (MC) 建模。传播器本质上是中性动力学方程的格林函数，它取决于等离子体轮廓。基于神经网络 (NN) 的传播器模型为等离子体中的中性分布函数提供了快速、准确的解决方案。此外，基于神经网络的传播器重建对等离子体参数的连续且平滑的依赖性开启了将该方法与基于雅可比行列式的时间积分和寻根方法一起使用的可能性。一…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2510.23088v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：研究了一种基于传播器的方法，用于聚变边界等离子体中中性粒子输运的蒙特卡罗 (MC) 建模。传播器本质上是中性动力学方程的格林函数，它取决于等离子体轮廓。基于神经网络 (NN) 的传播器模型为等离子体中的中性分布函数提供了快速、准确的解决方案。此外，基于神经网络的传播器重建对等离子体参数的连续且平滑的依赖性开启了将该方法与基于雅可比行列式的时间积分和寻根方法一起使用的可能性。一个小的一维测试问题的初步结果看起来很有希望；然而，重要的研究问题涉及算法扩展到更大的系统。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.23088v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A propagator-based approach is investigated for Monte-Carlo (MC) modeling of neutral particles transport in fusion boundary plasmas. The propagator is essentially a Green function for the neutral kinetic equation, which depends on the plasma profiles. A Neural Network (NN) based model for the propagator provides a fast and accurate solution for the neutral distribution function in plasma. Furthermore, continuous and smooth dependence of NN-based reconstruction of the propagator on the plasma parameters opens the possibility for using this approach with Jacobian-based methods for time-integration and root finding. Initial results from a small 1D test problem look promising; however, important research questions are concerned with the scaling of the algorithm to larger systems.

95

使用可解释的机器学习对物理参数提取的阻抗响应进行反演#

Inversion of the impedance response towards physical parameter extraction using interpretable machine learning
📚 arXiv👤 Mahmoud Nabil, Isel Grau-García, Ricardo Grau-Crespo, Said Hamad, Juan A. Anta📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将漂移扩散模拟与可解释机器学习相结合，突破了传统阻抗分析难以直接提取物理参数的瓶颈。核心创新在于利用广义等效电路特征训练梯度提升模型，并揭示不同偏置条件对提取复合参数与离子参数的选择性优势，为高
arXiv:2511.06929v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：由于离子和电子运动的复杂耦合，解释钙钛矿太阳能电池 (PSC) 的阻抗响应具有挑战性。虽然漂移扩散（DD）建模是一种可靠的方法，但其数学复杂性使得直接从实验数据中提取物理参数是不可行的。这项工作使用 DD 建模来生成标准 TiO2/MAPI/spiro 配置的阻抗谱的大型综合数据集。该数据集训练机器学习 (ML) 模型，以根据阻抗测量预测重组和离子参数。使用广义等效电路的特征…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2511.06929v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：由于离子和电子运动的复杂耦合，解释钙钛矿太阳能电池 (PSC) 的阻抗响应具有挑战性。虽然漂移扩散（DD）建模是一种可靠的方法，但其数学复杂性使得直接从实验数据中提取物理参数是不可行的。这项工作使用 DD 建模来生成标准 TiO2/MAPI/spiro 配置的阻抗谱的大型综合数据集。该数据集训练机器学习 (ML) 模型，以根据阻抗测量预测重组和离子参数。使用广义等效电路的特征的梯度提升回归器显示出最佳性能。解释分析表明，开路阻抗实验可以实现最佳的探针复合损失，而短路条件更适合提取浓度和迁移率等离子特征。经过训练的机器学习模型在实验光谱上进行了测试，确认推断的物理参数可以重现数据。对于所研究的配置，预测离子浓度为(1.3-3.3)e17 cm-3，离子淌度为(5-7)e-11 cm2V-1s-1，表面复合速度为7-9和23-40 m/s。这种方法提供了对从阻抗测量中提取的物理信息的洞察，并为机器学习模型明确推导太阳能电池效率决定参数铺平了道路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.06929v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Interpreting the impedance response of perovskite solar cells (PSCs) is challenging due to the complex coupling of ionic and electronic motion. While drift-diffusion (DD) modelling is a reliable method, its mathematical complexity makes directly extracting physical parameters from experimental data infeasible. This work uses DD modelling to generate a large synthetic dataset of impedance spectra for a standard TiO2/MAPI/spiro configuration. This dataset trains machine learning (ML) models to predict recombination and ionic parameters from impedance measurements. A Gradient Boosting Regressor, using features from a generalized equivalent circuit, showed the best performance. Interpretative analysis indicates that open-circuit impedance experiments best probe recombination losses, while short-circuit conditions are more adequate for extracting ionic features like concentrations and mobilities. The trained ML models were tested on experimental spectra, confirming the inferred physical parameters could reproduce the data. For the studied configuration, predicted ion concentrations were (1.3-3.3)e17 cm-3, ion mobilities were (5-7)e-11 cm2V-1s-1, and surface recombination velocities were 7-9 and 23-40 m/s. This approach provides insights into the physical information extractable from impedance measurements and paves the way for ML models to unambiguously derive efficiency-determining parameters for solar cells.

Bubble2Heat：使用物理编码的生成人工智能在泳池沸腾中进行光热推理#

Bubble2Heat: Optical to Thermal Inference in Pool Boiling Using Physics-encoded Generative AI
📚 arXiv👤 Qianxi Fu, Youngjoon Suh, Xiaojing Zhang, Sanghyeon Chang, Yoonjin Won📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：Bubble2Heat提出了一种基于条件生成对抗网络的深度学习框架，仅利用常规池沸腾实验中的分段高速图像和稀疏热电偶数据，即可重构出模拟级高时空分辨率温度场。其核心创新在于通过物理编码的预处理管道将模
arXiv:2505.00823v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：相变过程在热管理系统中起着至关重要的作用，但多相传热的定量表征仍然受到测量混沌、快速变化的流态中温度场的挑战的限制。虽然计算方法在理想情况下提供高时空分辨率的温度数据，但复制复杂的实验条件仍然非常困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度学习框架，可以从分段高速记录和逐点热电偶读数中生成模拟分辨率的温度场数据，这些数据通常在规范池沸腾实验配置中可用，而不需要先进…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2505.00823v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：相变过程在热管理系统中起着至关重要的作用，但多相传热的定量表征仍然受到测量混沌、快速变化的流态中温度场的挑战的限制。虽然计算方法在理想情况下提供高时空分辨率的温度数据，但复制复杂的实验条件仍然非常困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度学习框架，可以从分段高速记录和逐点热电偶读数中生成模拟分辨率的温度场数据，这些数据通常在规范池沸腾实验配置中可用，而不需要先进的技术。该框架利用仅在模拟数据上训练的条件生成对抗网络。为了确保模型对实验数据的直接适用性，我们的框架还引入了一个预处理管道，通过传统的图像处理和使用预训练的卷积神经网络进行图像分割，将高分辨率模拟数据与实验测量结果对齐。我们进一步表明，当精确的物理约束不适用时，标准数据增强策略可以有效地增强推理的物理合理性。我们的结果凸显了深度生成模型在弥合可观察的多相现象和底层热传输之间差距的潜力，提供了一种强大的方法来增强和解释复杂两相系统中的实验测量。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.00823v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Phase change process plays a critical role in thermal management systems, yet quantitative characterization of multiphase heat transfer remains limited by the challenges of measuring temperature fields in chaotic, rapidly evolving flow regimes. While computational methods offer temperature data at a high spatiotemporal resolution in ideal cases, replicating complex experimental conditions remains prohibitively difficult. In this paper, we present a deep learning framework that can generate temperature field data at simulation resolution from segmented high-speed recordings and pointwise thermocouple readings which are typically available in a canonical pool boiling experimental configuration without requiring advanced techniques. This framework leverages a conditional generative adversarial network trained only on simulation data. To ensure direct applicability of the model to experimental data, our framework also introduces a preprocessing pipeline that aligns high resolution simulation data with experimental measurements through both conventional image processing and image segmentation with pretrained convolutional neural network. We further show that standard data augmentation strategies are effective in enhancing the physical plausibility of the inference when precise physical constraints are not applicable. Our results highlight the potential of deep generative models to bridge the gap between observable multiphase phenomena and underlying thermal transport, offering a powerful approach to augment and interpret experimental measurements in complex two-phase systems.

97

探索自动驾驶实验室 kNN 噪声特征检测和恢复的局限性#

Exploring the Limitations of kNN Noisy Feature Detection and Recovery for Self-Driving Labs
📚 arXiv👤 Qiuyu Shi, Kangming Li, Yao Fehlis, Runze Zhang, Daniel Persaud, Robert Black, Jason Hattrick-Simpers📅 2026-02-03🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文针对自动驾驶实验室（SDL）中特征噪声损害材料发现的问题，提出了基于kNN的自动化噪声特征检测与恢复框架，系统揭示了数据集规模、噪声强度及特征分布对校正效果的影响规律，为提升自动化材料实验的数据质
arXiv:2507.16833v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：自动驾驶实验室 (SDL) 有望通过将机器学习与自动化实验平台相结合来加速材料发现。然而，输入参数捕获中的错误可能会破坏用于建模系统性能的特征，从而损害当前和未来的活动。本研究开发了一个自动化工作流程，可以系统地检测噪声特征，确定可以纠正的样本特征配对，并最终恢复正确的特征值。然后进行系统研究，以检查数据集大小、噪声强度、噪声类型和特征值分布如何影响密度…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2507.16833v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：自动驾驶实验室 (SDL) 有望通过将机器学习与自动化实验平台相结合来加速材料发现。然而，输入参数捕获中的错误可能会破坏用于建模系统性能的特征，从而损害当前和未来的活动。本研究开发了一个自动化工作流程，可以系统地检测噪声特征，确定可以纠正的样本特征配对，并最终恢复正确的特征值。然后进行系统研究，以检查数据集大小、噪声强度、噪声类型和特征值分布如何影响密度泛函理论 (DFT) 和 SDL 数据集上噪声特征的可检测性和可恢复性。一般来说，高强度的噪声和大的训练数据集有利于噪声特征的检测和校正。低强度噪声会减少检测和恢复，但可以通过更大的干净训练数据集进行补偿。检测和校正结果因特征而异，与离散或窄分布的特征相比，连续和分散的特征分布显示出更大的可恢复性。这项系统研究不仅展示了在存在噪声、有限数据和不同特征分布的情况下合理数据恢复的模型不可知框架，而且还提供了材料数据集中 kNN 插补的切实基准。最终，它的目标是提高自动化材料发现的数据质量和实验精度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.16833v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Self-driving laboratories (SDLs) have shown promise to accelerate materials discovery by integrating machine learning with automated experimental platforms. However, errors in the capture of input parameters may corrupt the features used to model system performance, compromising current and future campaigns. This study develops an automated workflow to systematically detect noisy features, determine sample-feature pairings that can be corrected, and finally recover the correct feature values. A systematic study is then performed to examine how dataset size, noise intensity, noise type, and feature value distribution affect both the detectability and recoverability of noisy features on both Density Functional Theory (DFT) and SDL datasets. In general, high-intensity noise and large training datasets are conducive to the detection and correction of noisy features. Low-intensity noise reduces detection and recovery but can be compensated for by larger clean training data sets. Detection and correction results vary between features, with continuous and dispersed feature distributions showing greater recoverability compared to features with discrete or narrow distributions. This systematic study not only demonstrates a model agnostic framework for rational data recovery in the presence of noise, limited data, and differing feature distributions but also provides a tangible benchmark of kNN imputation in materials datasets. Ultimately, it aims to enhance data quality and experimental precision in automated materials discovery.

98

自旋量子位的完全自主调谐#

Fully autonomous tuning of a spin qubit
📚 Nature Electronics👤 Jonas Schuff, Miguel J. Carballido, Madeleine Kotzagiannidis, Juan Carlos Calvo 等17位作者📅 2026-02-02🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次实现了半导体量子位从初始化到拉比振荡的全流程自主调谐，通过融合深度学习、贝叶斯优化与计算机视觉，突破了大规模量子电路手动调谐的瓶颈。这一自动化框架可推广至多种半导体量子器件，为量子位质量的统
大规模半导体量子电路的发展受到有效调谐和操作此类电路的困难的限制。确定这些量子位的最佳操作条件尤其复杂，并且涉及对巨大参数空间的探索。在这里，我们报告了半导体量子位的自主调谐，从接地设备到拉比振荡。我们的方法集成了深度学习、贝叶斯优化和计算机视觉技术。我们在锗硅核壳纳米线器件中演示了这种自动化。为了说明完全自动化的潜力，我们描述了拉比频率和 g 因子如何依赖于算法找到的量子位之一的势垒门电压。我们希望我们的自动化算法适用于一系列半导体…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

大规模半导体量子电路的发展受到有效调谐和操作此类电路的困难的限制。确定这些量子位的最佳操作条件尤其复杂，并且涉及对巨大参数空间的探索。在这里，我们报告了半导体量子位的自主调谐，从接地设备到拉比振荡。我们的方法集成了深度学习、贝叶斯优化和计算机视觉技术。我们在锗硅核壳纳米线器件中演示了这种自动化。为了说明完全自动化的潜力，我们描述了拉比频率和 g 因子如何依赖于算法找到的量子位之一的势垒门电压。我们希望我们的自动化算法适用于一系列半导体量子位设备，从而可以对量子位质量指标进行统计研究。

English Abstract

The development of large-scale semiconductor quantum circuits is limited by the difficulties involved in efficiently tuning and operating such circuits. Identifying optimal operating conditions for these qubits is, in particular, complex and involves the exploration of vast parameter spaces. Here we report the autonomous tuning of a semiconductor qubit, from a grounded device to Rabi oscillations. Our approach integrates deep learning, Bayesian optimization and computer vision techniques. We demonstrate this automation in a germanium–silicon core–shell nanowire device. To illustrate the potential of full automation, we characterize how the Rabi frequency andg-factor depend on barrier gate voltages for one of the qubits found by the algorithm. We expect our automation algorithm to be applicable to a range of semiconductor qubit devices, allowing for the statistical studies of qubit-quality metrics.

[原始信息] Nature Electronics, Published online: 02 February 2026; doi:10.1038/s41928-025-01562-4 An algorithm that combines deep learning, Bayesian optimization and computer vision techniques can be used to autonomously tune a semiconductor spin qubit from a grounded device to Rabi oscillations.

99

离散空间中的智能步行者#

Smart Walkers in Discrete Space
📚 arXiv👤 Gianluca Peri, Lorenzo Buffoni, Giacomo Chiti, Duccio Fanelli, Raffaele Marino, Andrea Nocentini, Pier Paolo Panti📅 2026-02-02🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将强化学习引入离散空间随机游走模型，核心创新在于发现配置熵可作为无先验信息下衡量智能体学习能力的普适指标。通过追逐者-目标博弈与Stockfish棋局验证，为评估智能体适应性提供了无需知晓奖励函
arXiv:2601.22235v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们研究在离散空间中移动的可训练智能体的统计特性。在介绍了数学框架之后，我们首先分析了两个完全随机游走者的动力学，这两个游走者在追逐者-目标交互方案中相互竞争。通过分析获得遭遇的统计数据，并通过数值模拟来测试预测。然后，我们继续使用强化学习，将基线案例扩展到能够学习和适应外部奖励信号的代理。聪明的步行者会改变遭遇的统计数据，以最大化他们的累积奖励，正如数字和分析见解相结合所证实…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.22235v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们研究在离散空间中移动的可训练智能体的统计特性。在介绍了数学框架之后，我们首先分析了两个完全随机游走者的动力学，这两个游走者在追逐者-目标交互方案中相互竞争。通过分析获得遭遇的统计数据，并通过数值模拟来测试预测。然后，我们继续使用强化学习，将基线案例扩展到能够学习和适应外部奖励信号的代理。聪明的步行者会改变遭遇的统计数据，以最大化他们的累积奖励，正如数字和分析见解相结合所证实的那样。更有趣的是，配置熵被证明是一个可靠的代理，可以在不存在有关代理的其他信息（即奖励信号、策略等）的情况下衡量代理处理分配任务的能力。我们通过操作 Stockfish 国际象棋引擎来对抗准随机的未经训练的对手，进一步测试所提出的学习技能衡量标准。获得的结论证实了我们的主张。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.22235v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the statistical properties of trainable agents moving in discrete space. After introducing the mathematical framework, we first analyze the dynamics of two completely random walkers, mutually competing in a chaser-target interaction scheme. The statistics of the encounters is analytically obtained and the predictions tested versus numerical simulations. We then move forward to extend the baseline case to agents capable of learning and adapting to an external reward signal, using reinforcement learning. Smart walkers morph the statistics of the encounter, to maximize their cumulated reward, as confirmed by combined numerical and analytical insights. More interestingly, configuration entropy proves a reliable proxy to gauge the acquired ability of the agents to cope with the assigned task when no other information about them (i.e. reward signal, policy, etc) is present. We further test the proposed measure of learned skills by operating the Stockfish chess engine against a quasi-random untrained opponent. The obtained conclusions corroborate our claim.

100

将绝缘体变成加速器：通过机器学习分子动力学模拟解读 ZrO2-Li2ZrCl6 复合材料中界面电导率的提升#

Turning Insulators into Accelerators: Deciphering the Interfacial Conductivity Boost in ZrO2-Li2ZrCl6 Composites through Machine Learning Molecular Dynamics Simulations
📚 arXiv👤 Boyuan Xu, Chen Qian, Liyi Bai, Chenlu Wang, Feng Ding, Qisheng Wu📅 2026-02-02🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究开发了基于神经进化势的机器学习力场，首次实现ZrO₂/Li₂ZrCl₆异质结构的大规模分子动力学模拟，揭示界面自发非晶化及空间电荷效应对Li⁺传输的增强机制，为固态电池复合电解质的设计提供了理论
arXiv:2601.22612v1 公告类型：新 摘要：卤化物固态电解质由于其高氧化稳定性和可变形性而成为全固态锂电池的有希望的候选者，但其适度的离子电导率仍然是一个瓶颈。虽然实验表明掺入离子绝缘 ZrO2 纳米粒子 (Nat. Commun. 2023, 14, 2459) 可以增强 Li2ZrCl6 的离子电导率，但控制这种界面现象的原子起源仍不清楚。在这里，我们通过开发基于神经进化势的精确机器学习力场，弥合了复杂异质结构建模中…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.22612v1 公告类型：新 摘要：卤化物固态电解质由于其高氧化稳定性和可变形性而成为全固态锂电池的有希望的候选者，但其适度的离子电导率仍然是一个瓶颈。虽然实验表明掺入离子绝缘 ZrO2 纳米粒子 (Nat. Commun. 2023, 14, 2459) 可以增强 Li2ZrCl6 的离子电导率，但控制这种界面现象的原子起源仍不清楚。在这里，我们通过开发基于神经进化势的精确机器学习力场，弥合了复杂异质结构建模中的时空差距，从而实现了 ZrO2/Li2ZrCl6 异质结构的大规模分子动力学模拟。通过系统地研究四种具有代表性的低晶格失配 ZrO2/Li2ZrCl6 界面，我们识别了由表面解理时的空间电荷效应驱动的自发界面非晶化，捕获 Li+ 并导致具有明显几何变形的欠配位 Li+ 多面体。这些扭曲的非晶界面区域表现出显着增强的Li+跳跃活性，显着优于体晶格，前提是局部可移动的Li+库存不会因表面电荷重新分布而耗尽。这项工作建立了一个计算框架，用于训练经过验证的机器学习界面力场，并提供对绝缘体-导体复合材料界面电导率提升的机械理解，指导下一代固态电池电解质的合理设计。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.22612v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Halide solid-state electrolytes have emerged as promising candidates for all-solid-state lithium batteries due to their high oxidative stability and deformability, yet their moderate ionic conductivity remains a bottleneck. While incorporating ionically insulating ZrO2 nanoparticles (Nat. Commun. 2023, 14, 2459) has been experimentally shown to enhance the ionic conductivity of Li2ZrCl6, the atomistic origin governing this interfacial phenomenon remains unclear. Here, we bridge the spatiotemporal gap in modeling complex heterostructures by developing an accurate machine-learned force fields based on neuroevolution potential, enabling large-scale molecular dynamics simulations of ZrO2/Li2ZrCl6 heterostructures. By systematically investigating four representative low-lattice-mismatch ZrO2/Li2ZrCl6 interfaces, we identify spontaneous interfacial amorphization driven by space-charge effects upon surface cleavage, trapping Li+ and leading to under-coordinated Li+ polyhedrons with pronounced geometric distortion. These distorted amorphous interfacial regions exhibit markedly enhanced Li+ hopping activity, significantly outperforming the bulk lattice, provided that local mobile Li+ inventory is not depleted by surface charge redistribution. This work establishes a computational framework for training validated machine-learned force fields for interfaces and provides mechanistic understandings of the interfacial conductivity boost in the insulator-conductor composites, guiding the rational design of electrolytes toward next-generation solid-state batteries.

101

用弧长连续解决非晶碳中的结构雪崩#

Resolving Structural Avalanches in Amorphous Carbon with Arclength Continuation
📚 arXiv👤 Fraser Birks, Ibrahim Ghanem, Lars Pastewka, James Kermode, Maciej Buze📅 2026-02-02🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究针对非晶碳塑性变形中的结构雪崩现象，创新性地引入伪弧长数值延拓框架，将能量景观探索与事件驱动动力学相结合。核心突破在于实现了雪崩的无时间步长偏倚统计，并揭示了雪崩前兆的势阱分离特征，为理解非晶固
arXiv:2601.22933v1 公告类型：新 摘要：非晶固体中的塑性变形是通过自组织成雪崩的局部剪切变换来实现的。在用机器学习的原子间势建模的无定形碳中，我们发现这些雪崩的能量和组织可以通过系统地遵循潜在的能量景观来解决。通过伪弧长数值延拓框架，我们将雪崩分解为成分剪切变换并确定其应变相关的能量学。我们的分析表明，在雪崩发生之前，雪崩具有由分离良好的局部最小值组成的潜在结构。我们进一步证明，弧长连续产生了一个事件驱动框架，用于跟…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.22933v1 公告类型：新 摘要：非晶固体中的塑性变形是通过自组织成雪崩的局部剪切变换来实现的。在用机器学习的原子间势建模的无定形碳中，我们发现这些雪崩的能量和组织可以通过系统地遵循潜在的能量景观来解决。通过伪弧长数值延拓框架，我们将雪崩分解为成分剪切变换并确定其应变相关的能量学。我们的分析表明，在雪崩发生之前，雪崩具有由分离良好的局部最小值组成的潜在结构。我们进一步证明，弧长连续产生了一个事件驱动框架，用于跟踪雪崩动力学，消除了统计雪崩特性（例如应力降分布）的时间步长影响。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.22933v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Plastic deformation in amorphous solids is carried by localized shear transformations that self-organize into avalanches. In amorphous carbon modeled with a machine-learned interatomic potential, we find that the energetics and organization of these avalanches can be resolved by systematically following the underlying energy landscape. With a pseudo-arclength numerical continuation framework, we decompose avalanches into constituent shear transformations and determine their strain-dependent energetics. Our analysis shows that, prior to onset, avalanches have a latent structure that consists of well-separated local minima. We further demonstrate that arclength continuation yields an event driven framework for following avalanche dynamics, eliminating time-step effects on statistical avalanche properties such as distributions of stress drops.

102

时间噪声驱动的空间自组织#

Spatial self-organization driven by temporal noise
📚 arXiv👤 Satyam Anand, Guanming Zhang, Stefano Martiniani📅 2026-02-02🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示时间关联噪声可驱动空间自组织并诱导超均匀性，突破空间噪声主导的传统认知；建立的脉动流体动力学理论定量解释其机制，并将粒子动力学与神经网络扰动梯度下降建立深刻对应，为自组装材料、生物系统及
arXiv:2601.23098v1 公告类型：新 摘要：从噪声中反直觉地出现秩序是科学中的一个核心现象，从模式形成和同步到受挫系统中的无序有序。虽然局部空间噪声引起的大规模空间自组织已得到充分研究，但时间噪声是否也能驱动这种组织仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这里，通过研究相互作用的粒子系统，我们表明时间相关的噪声可以导致自组织状态，并抑制长程密度波动或超均匀性。此外，我们发展了一种脉动流体动力学理论，定量地解释了这种现象的起源。最后，…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.23098v1 公告类型：新 摘要：从噪声中反直觉地出现秩序是科学中的一个核心现象，从模式形成和同步到受挫系统中的无序有序。虽然局部空间噪声引起的大规模空间自组织已得到充分研究，但时间噪声是否也能驱动这种组织仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这里，通过研究相互作用的粒子系统，我们表明时间相关的噪声可以导致自组织状态，并抑制长程密度波动或超均匀性。此外，我们发展了一种脉动流体动力学理论，定量地解释了这种现象的起源。最后，通过将动力学转化为随机优化问题，我们表明时间相关性会带来更好的解决方案，类似于神经网络中的扰动梯度下降——在训练期间注入噪声以逃避较差的最小值。这揭示了粒子系统能量景观上的扰动梯度下降动力学与神经网络损失景观之间的惊人对应关系。我们的研究将时间相关性建立为噪声驱动自组织的一种新机制，对自组装材料、生物系统和利用时间噪声进行差分私人学习等应用的优化算法具有广泛的影响。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.23098v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The counterintuitive emergence of order from noise is a central phenomenon in science, ranging from pattern formation and synchronization to order-by-disorder in frustrated systems. While large-scale spatial self-organization induced by local spatial noise is well studied, whether temporal noise can also drive such organization remains an open question. Here, by studying interacting particle systems, we show that temporally correlated noise can lead to a self-organized state with suppressed long-range density fluctuations, or hyperuniformity. Further, we develop a fluctuating hydrodynamic theory that quantitatively explains the origin of this phenomenon. Finally, by casting the dynamics as a stochastic optimization problem, we show that temporal correlations lead to better solutions, akin to perturbed gradient descent in neural networks -- where noise is injected during training to escape poor minima. This reveals a striking correspondence between perturbed gradient descent dynamics on the energy landscapes of particle systems and the loss landscapes of neural networks. Our study establishes temporal correlations as a novel mechanism for noise-driven self-organization, with broad implications for self-assembling materials, biological systems, and optimization algorithms that leverage temporal noise for applications like differentially private learning.

103

用于预测非卷积和卷积 X 射线吸收光谱的通用快速机器学习模型#

Universal rapid machine learning models for predicting unconvoluted and convoluted X-ray Absorption Spectra
📚 arXiv👤 Fei Zhan, Zhi Geng, Lirong Zheng, Haifeng Zhao📅 2026-02-02🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作开发了首个统一、通用的机器学习模型，可直接从三维结构快速预测多元素（3d/4d金属、镧系及S等）的非卷积与卷积XANES光谱，并兼容不同仪器展宽；其核心创新在于以单一模型跨越硬X射线与软X射线
arXiv:2601.22173v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：X 射线吸收近边缘结构 (XANES) 是阐明给定材料和分子的原子尺度局部三维 (3D) 结构的重要工具。基于分子 3D 结构的 XANES 快速计算构成了 XANES 定量分析的重要组成部分。在这里，我们提出了 XANES 预测模型。它以 3D 结构作为输入，生成非卷积 XANES 或卷积光谱作为输出，在不同仪器拓宽中表现出出色的通用性。该模型验证了其对硬 X 射线…
